name: django-oauth2-authcodeflow
summary: Authenticate with any OpenId Connect/Oauth2 provider through authorization code flow. PKCE is also supported.
author: Cyrille Pontvieux, Befog, Eric Plaster, Gabriel Dugny, Niko Tyni, Pinoatrome, Samir Hachimi, Sebastian Annies
author_email: Cyrille Pontvieux <cyrille@enialis.net>, Befog <ofogelberg@gmail.com>, Eric Plaster <plaster@gmail.com>, Gabriel Dugny <gabriel.dugny@manomano.com>, Niko Tyni <ntyni@cc.helsinki.fi>, Pinoatrome <pinoatrome@users.noreply.github.com>, Samir Hachimi <shachimi@systra.com>, Sebastian Annies <Sebastian.Annies@gmail.com>
